name: Zeotech Limited
summary: Zeotech Limited operates as an industrial kaolin and mineral processing technology company in Australia and Botswana. It primarily explores for kaolin deposit, as well as for gold, nickel, copper, and platinum group metal deposits. The company focuses on the Abercorn project that consists of 50 sub-blocks located in Queensland, Australia. It also holds a 100% interest in the Kraaipan gold-nickel-copper-PGM Project located in southern Botswana. The company was formerly known as Metalsearch Limited and changed its name to Zeotech Limited in December 2020. Zeotech Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Brisbane, Australia.
